name: InsertTag
postconditions: The notification about the inclusion of the tag.
The notification about the inclusion of the tag.

UC30: Access the functionality of inserting new tag search.
Show the form for entering a tag.
Fill out the form with the required information and submit.

Verify the data entered and check if the tag is already present in the system. In the latter case the active use case ExistingErrorTag. Instead, if the data is invalid or insufficient, the system activates the use case Errored.
